summary: Iteration 4: All 6 auth/registration flows tested and passing. Fixed a critical missing `useEffect` import in Landing.js that would have caused runtime errors.

test_results.1_register_unique_email: PASS - New user test_<timestamp>@test.com registered successfully, redirected to /dashboard, no error shown.
test_results.2_register_duplicate_email: PASS - data-testid='auth-error' shows 'El email ya está registrado' (real server error, NOT generic fallback).
test_results.3_login_success: PASS - test@cibermedida.es / Test2024! logs in and navigates to /dashboard.
test_results.4_login_wrong_password: PASS - 'Email o contraseña incorrectos' shown in data-testid='auth-error', modal remains open.
test_results.5_authenticated_visit_root: PASS - Logged-in user visiting '/' is redirected to /dashboard via useEffect in Landing.
test_results.6_logout: PASS - data-testid='logout-btn' found, click logs out and redirects to '/'.

bug_fixed_during_testing.issue: useEffect was used on line 135 but not imported on line 1 (only useState was imported). This would cause a ReferenceError at runtime.
bug_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added useEffect to the React import: `import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';`

critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js: useEffect was missing from React import - FIXED in this iteration.
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_<timestamp>@test.com via registration flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 auth flows verified passing. useEffect import bug in Landing.js was fixed. Error handler reads .detail OR .error OR .message. Navigation uses useEffect on user state change in Landing component.
rca_of_issue: N/A - Only bug was missing useEffect import in Landing.js (fixed). All auth flows working correctly.
